title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people playing volleyball. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Four young people are playing volleyball on a sandy beach. One girl is jumping to hit the ball over the net. There is sand, the sea and some beach umbrellas in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at a hairdresser's. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A boy is having his hair cut in a hairdresser's shop. He is sitting in a chair while a hairdresser is standing behind him with a comb. There is a large mirror and bottles on a shelf nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
